case_title: TROY MANTEUFEL VS. KCK BUILDERS INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY MANTEUFEL, TROY AS TO DEFENDANT KCK BUILDERS INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-20-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-24-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT KCK BUILDERS INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT KCK BUILDERS INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-20-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-20-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY MIKE HANNEGAN--PRESIDENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES DEFECTIVE SERVICE IN OPEN COURT TODAY. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-20-2015 - JUDGMENT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MANTEUFEL, TROY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT KCK BUILDERS INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
